author: sumaiyanaazim
name: 9L BigramHash XSA SWA LateQAT UNet ResidMix
blurb: Standard 9-layer transformer (dim=512, MLP 2x, GQA 8q/4kv) with U-Net skip connections + resid_mix (x0 blending) + BigramHash(2048) + XSA on top-3 layers + SWA (last 30%) + late QAT at 80% wallclock + qk_gain=1.5 + tied_embed_init_std=0.005.
